```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement repository pattern for data access abstraction"
---
# Repository Pattern
## Task
Implement repository pattern for data access.
## Requirements
1. Define repository interface per aggregate. 2. Implement with specific data store.
3. Support CRUD operations. 4. Support query specifications.
5. Enable testing with in-memory repository.
## Constraints
- Interface in domain layer. Implementation in infrastructure. Testable with fakes.
## Success Criteria
- Data access abstracted. Implementation swappable. Testable with in-memory store.
```
